verifyEmail.message: Verify your email to keep access to your account across all apps.
verifyEmail.error: Couldn't send the email. Try again later.

stay_fit.name: Stay Fit
stay_fit.summary: Consistent full-body training, 2–4 days a week at a comfortable, sustainable effort.

build_muscle.name: Build Muscle
build_muscle.summary: Hypertrophy focus: 3–5 days a week, moderate-to-hard sets with steadily rising volume.

strength.name: Strength
strength.summary: Heavy compound lifts, 3–4 days a week, low reps with full rests and careful progression.

bodybuilding.name: Bodybuilding
bodybuilding.summary: High-volume body-part training, 4–6 days a week, with intensity techniques and symmetry focus.

notes.deload_scheduled: Deload week: planned recovery — lighter loads, fewer sets. This is where progress consolidates.
notes.deload_stalls: Deload triggered early: several lifts have stalled. A lighter week sets up the next push.
notes.deload_recovery: Deload triggered early: your recovery check-ins have been low for several days. This week is deliberately easy.
notes.eased_today: Recovery has been a bit low lately — today's targets are eased. Listen to your body.

exNotes.first_time: First time: pick a weight you could lift for the target reps with 2–3 left in the tank.
exNotes.backoff: Backing off ~10% after a hard patch — build back up.
exNotes.hold_add_rep: Same weight — aim for one more rep per set.
exNotes.deload_light: Deload: lighter on purpose. Move well, stop fresh.
exNotes.intensity_optional: Optional: take the last set close to failure or add a drop set.
